name: Fried Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and place them in a large saucepan filled with water to cover. Add salt to the water for cooking. Bring to a boil, then simmer until the potatoes are cooked but firm (about 20 minutes). Rinse with cold water and drain.
2. Slice the cooled potatoes about 1/4 - 1/2 inch thick.
3. Melt butter in a frying pan over medium-high heat. Add potato slices and pan-fry until desired crispness, flipping occasionally to coat with butter.
4. Season with salt and seasoned salt to taste. If the potatoes start sticking, add more butter (about 1/4 lb is usually needed).
5. Serve with steak or ribs if desired.
